# Transcrição: 6. More Pressing Problems

- **Fonte:** 6. More Pressing Problems
- **Duração:** 01:06
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:06]

More pressing problems. Your client has more pressing problems than the problems you can solve right now and you don't know what they are. So you're sitting in the bleachers, you're a spectator, you might not even be in the stadium right now, they got problems in their face so big they can't even look at you. Yes, they were interested. Yes, they hit your website. Yes, they called you. Yes, they spent time investigating. They spent three hours with you on two different occasions but they got problems right now that just don't allow you to get in front of them. Again, follow-up. That's why it's so important to keep your pipeline full. Five to twelve responses, five to twelve follow-ups before you're going to close 80% of your clients. Just hang in there. The problems will be relieved. You'll be the last man or woman standing because you're a pro committed to follow-up. It's a pressing problem. A lower price won't help and a better product will not solve the problem. Their problems, their problems are so big right now. Once those relieve, maybe new problem pops up that you can solve. You be there when that happens. You'll make that sale.
